job.title: Experienced ELK Consultant M/F
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As an experienced ELK Consultant in Aix-en-Provence, you deploy and manage Elasticsearch / Logstash / Kibana platforms for our clients. You are the team's observability expert.
mission.1: Déployer et administrer des clusters Elasticsearch
mission.2: Concevoir des pipelines d'ingestion avec Logstash et Filebeat
mission.3: Créer des dashboards Kibana pour le monitoring et la sécurité
mission.4: Optimiser les performances et la scalabilité des clusters
mission.5: Intégrer la stack ELK dans les environnements clients
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in informatique
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience with la stack Elastic
profile.5: Knowledge of la sécurité SI is a plus
